allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from google import genai; c = genai.Client\(api_key='test'\); print\(dir\(c\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from google import genai; c = genai.Client\(api_key='test'\); print\([a for a in dir\(c\) if 'key' in a.lower\(\) or 'api' in a.lower\(\)]\)")
